hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath',''); print(f if f.endswith('.js') else '')" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && cd "C:/Users/User/OneDrive/Documenten - Waterbeheer/Software/Digital Dagstaat/nieuwe_site_tryout" && npx eslint "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
